title: Ohio mass shooting: Multiple injured in Toledo Old West End festival, manhunt under way
summary_full: Twelve people were shot near Toledo's Old West End Festival on Saturday afternoon, prompting a large police response. All victims are expected to survive. Authorities are investigating the incident, which occurred during the popular community event, and are seeking information to identify the suspects.
